programme.desc: The final six girls arrive in New Zealand where they learn they will participate in go-sees with six designers. This week's photoshoot finds them all modeling the same dress with a special guest, a sheep!

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison Ford scored a hit as part of the Star Wars ensemble, but many doubt he has leading man potential. When Tom Selleck falls out of the cast of Raiders of the Lost Ark, can Harrison step into the role of Indiana Jones and prove his doubters wrong?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: After a string of hits with LucasFilm, Harrison cuts and runs to work with Ridley Scott on Blade Runner where on-set clashes and chaos create a production in peril.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison dons the fedora for another Indy movie but would George Lucas’s failed marriage spell Doom for the script? And when Sean Connery joins the franchise in the third installment will there be enough screen for two leading men?
programme.sub-title: DOOMED MARRIAGE AND THE CONNERY CRUSADE

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison leverages his star power to gain director approval as he takes on the role of Jack Ryan in Tom Clancy’s Patriot Games. But Harrison’s outsized control behind the camera threatens to have an effect on performances in front of it.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison’s role as a doctor on the run in The Fugitive is mirrored behind the scenes with a runaway production marred by grueling shoots, crew firings, an elusive third act and a star playing a doctor in need of real life medical attention.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison reaches new heights in Air Force One - an aircraft so secretive it takes intel from a sitting US President to help make the film. Another movie threatens a titanic problem that may keep Air Force one from an on time departure.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: Bob Kane and Bill Finger’s costumed hero leaped off the page and onto the screen in 1966, but it wasn’t the dark detective fans anticipated.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?
programme.sub-title: My Smile is Just Skin Deep

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: On a mission to top his first outing, Nolan pushes his team harder than ever. But when tragedy strikes, no one is prepared.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond began with real life spy and anxious bridegroom, Ian Fleming. But it would take a bumpy road to bring this spy story to the screen. An unlikely team finds an unknown Scottish actor and faces down a troubled production to change cinema forever.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Despite their wild success the cracks begin to show. With the departure of their star, Cubby Broccoli and Harry Saltzman must find a new actor to play the super-spy, adding tension to a strained relationship. How disastrous can their new choice be?
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Wouldn’t Be King

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Though diamonds may be forever, Connery wasn’t. The producers need a new star and their choice revolutionizes the character. Embracing the cultural changes of the 70s takes Bond to new heights, but for one producer it would be the end of an era.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With an aging actor in the lead and a new director in charge, the Battle of the Bonds divides the franchise before a new gritty take on the character nearly drives it to ruin. But it's the studio that threatens to deliver the finishing blow to Bond.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: The Salt of the Earth
programme.desc: Wim Wenders doc on the photographer Sebastiao Salgado and his work.

programme.title: The Square
programme.desc: Christian's next art installation \\"The Square\\", invites passersby to altruism. The museum's PR agency has created an unexpected campaign for \\"The Square\\". The response is overblown and sends Christian and the museum, into an existential crisis.

programme.title: Life of Crime
programme.desc: A pampered housewife (Jennifer Aniston) is kidnapped by a pair of blundering ex-cons in an effort to extort money from her sleazy real-estate tycoon husband (Tim Robbins).

programme.title: Blind Ambition
programme.desc: Four Zimbabwean men form their country's first Wine Tasting Olympics team.

programme.title: I, Anna
programme.desc: The lives of a beautiful divorcee and a troubled detective intersect during the investigation of a vicious murder on the grimy, rain-soaked streets of London, sparking a tangled web of passion, intrigue, and deceit.

programme.title: Pina
programme.desc: A tribute to the late German choreographer Pina Bausch, as her dancers perform her most famous creations.

programme.title: The Lunchbox (English Subtitles)
programme.desc: A mistaken delivery in Mumbai's famously efficient lunchbox delivery system connects a young housewife to an old man in the dusk of his life as they build a fantasy world together through notes in the lunchbox.

programme.title: The Truth
programme.desc: Starring Catherine Deneuve, Juliette Binoche and Ethan Hawke. About a stormy reunion between a daughter and her actress mother, Catherine, against the backdrop of Catherine's latest role in a sci-fi picture as a mother who never grows old.

programme.title: The Sun
programme.desc: Alexander Sokurov's film about Emporer Hirohito's surrender at the end of World War II.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Monkey

programme.desc: The pilgrims find a village cursed with drought by a water monster who demands boy sacrifices. With Monkey’s cloud useless, brave Pigsy volunteers to give his life to save the people.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A wall divides the lands of night and day. The Queen of Night feasts on blood, the King of Day enslaves all. Reuniting them is hard when Monkey and Pigsy are both distracted by women.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A village is ravaged by locusts led by Demon Queen Grasshopper, chasing the magic Lake Lok-Nor. Can the pilgrims stop her swarms, or will she turn them all into pigs?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Honored guests of a prime minister, the pilgrims face black magicians and bandits. Tripitaka falls ill with Tibetan Fever, while Pigsy hunts a vampire and uncovers a shocking truth.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a blizzard, starving pilgrims hide in a cave. Monkey tricks Pigsy into “sacrifice,” making Tripitaka believe he ate his disciple. Overcome with grief, he is possessed by Pigsy’s spirit.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Red Hog kingdom, pigs are gods and Pigsy is crowned king. But the ruler is a demon who slew the old king. Rebels help Monkey and Sandy save the princess and stop the cult.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a ghostly village, demons and witches await the pilgrims. If believed in, they live again. One by one, the travellers are lured into deadly traps of illusion and betrayal.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A God cursed two lovers, aging Yu-Lee into the Well’s keeper. To restore her youth, Tripitaka must drink. Chaos ensues when Pigsy and Sandy drink the water—becoming pregnant.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Fire Queen’s land, volcanoes block the way. Only her magic fan can douse the flames, but since her husband left her for a human, winning her aid proves a fiery challenge.

programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside has a chance encounter with an old flame (Dana Wynter) who plans to steal a jade tiger the chief is guarding.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A badly beaten attorney (James Olson) describes an unconscious man aboard a sinking boat.
programme.sub-title: Fragile Is the House of Cards

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A top-security scientist disappears and Ironside discovers an unexplained $50,000 in his bank account.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A couple (Sharon Gless, Russell Wiggins) disappears while throwing a "haunted house" party in an abandoned mansion.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside is accidentally tipped to an organization that is illegally supplying Mexican domestics to U.S. families.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside pretends to quit the force and poses as a Skid Row derelict to trap a killer; guest Kim Darby.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A nightclub psychic (Ross Martin) knows more than the newspapers about a fatal fire; guest Louise Sorel.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Vengeful mobsters stalk an ex-POW (Cliff Potts) searching frantically for his supposedly dead police-officer father.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A paid informant's (Allen Garfield) cover is blown, endangering his wife and daughter; guests Albert Salmi, Nancy Malone.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: After a friend is beaten, Mark is the bait to trap the attackers' loan-shark boss; guests Scatman Crothers, Albert Popwell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Lt. Reese falls under suspicion after the disappearance of heroin intended as evidence against a mob boss.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A con artist (Michael Bell) kidnaps a captured bank robber's (Paul Burke) child and demands the loot as ransom.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The martial-arts murder of a Chinatown elder leads Ironside to a larcenous youth gang; guests Benson Fong, Frank Michael Liu, Mako.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An invitation to Ironside's class reunion contains one classmate's suggestion that her husband was murdered; guest Anne Francis.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's (Kim Hunter) son (James Keach) is found dead shortly before his supposedly dead sister (Gretchen Corbett) reappears.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Attempts are made on a professor's (Michael Parks) life after he is mentioned on a tape left behind by a student who committed suicide.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A woman (Elizabeth Ashley) who hit Ironside's van suffers from an embedded bullet that shifted position.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown, handcuffed to a prisoner (Andy Robinson), disappears after his plane is forced down in Reno.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Katherine Kelly examines Middlesbrough murderer Reginald Wilson, described by criminal psychologists as one of the most dangerous men ever to be assessed.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Lorraine Thorpe hit headlines as Britain's youngest female double-killer. But more deaths were about to rock the Suffolk town. Katherine Kelly explores.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Darlington: Katherine Kelly explores cannibal killer David Harker. One of the UK's most disturbed psychopaths, his crime rocked Darlington, causing a second horrific murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Katherine Kelly examines how the murder of 18-year-old Louise Smith rocked the city of Bristol, after she disappeared on Christmas Eve in 1995

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Greenock: Katherine Kelly examines the 1986 murder of 16-year-old Elaine Doyle. One of Scotland's longest-running murder enquiries, it took 26 years to find her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Nuneaton: Katherine Kelly explores the senseless murder of 15-year-old Naomi Smith and how a series of breakthroughs and DNA evidence led police to her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Grimsby: Katherine Kelly looks into the 2011 murder of Adam Vincent, a killing so brutal it sparked North Lincolnshire's biggest police investigation in over a century.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Croydon: Katherine Kelly explores the tragic death of Cassandra McDermott. It took a brutal attack on another woman and a decade of chasing before her killer was caught

programme.title: Murdertown With Anita Rani
programme.desc: With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britain's darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, Assia Newton had it all. But she lived in fear of her violent and controlling husband, Kelvin. When Assia finally escaped, she dreamt of a new life. But Kelvin still ruled her life… and he would end it

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: When Chris Regan started dating coworker Kelly Cochran, he knew she was married. But he had no idea of the wedding day pact she had made with husband Jason. Chris had become entangled in a love triangle that would see two people lose their lives.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun
programme.desc: Amin Miah wanted a devout, homely wife to start a family with. Mahmuda Khatun wanted a career, a social life - and her family off her back. Their differences were irreconcilable, and one of them would choose the violent way out.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Alberto Benitez is a successful police instructor in Kingsville, Texas. When he breaks up with his girlfriend, her obsession turns his life into a vicious game of survival.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A kind-hearted fifth grader befriends a strange girl in her neighborhood. Little does she know that her good intentions will have life-altering consequences.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Predator By Proxy
programme.desc: After Angell kicks her ex-husband Michael out of the house, he returns for revenge. Michael creates fake advertisements that send strange men right to Angell's door.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness
programme.desc: When Susan Zarriello's ex-husband David unleashes a sadistic torrent of cyber attacks 15 years after their divorce, Susan realizes he's been watching her for years.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of officer Douglas Iversen
programme.desc: Prosecutors said the death of 16-year-old Neil Beagley was completely preventable; so much so his parents were charged with criminally negligent homicide.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of Scott Nelson
programme.desc: Jennifer Fulford was a middle-aged nanny excited to travel to Dallas to meet her grandchild for the first time. But when ex-con Scott Nelson looked at her, he saw a target for his rage.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 049
programme.desc: Murder of Sara Summer – Sara’s burned body was found in a TN cornfield. Though suspicion fell on her estranged husband, eyewitnesses and a confession convicted her boyfriend Jason Sanders, who served 15 years for the murder.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 049

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 042
programme.desc: Murder of Beverly Carter – When real estate agent Beverly vanished during a showing, police raced against time. Texts from her phone led them down a dark, twisted path in their quest for justice.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 042

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 082
programme.desc: Jerrick Jackson, 47, was shot protecting his daughter during a home invasion. Five teens, ages 16–19, were caught on camera and arrested after using his stolen ATM card.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 082

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 007
programme.desc: Amanda Plasse, 20, was found stabbed in her apartment. A bloody shoe print and a whiteboard message—“Dennis was here”—led police to Dennis Rosa Roman, whose shoes matched the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 007

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 063
programme.desc: Murder of Peggy Pettis – A retired woman’s death seemed like an overdose, but her husband’s affair raised suspicion. He admitted poisoning her for insurance money and love of another woman. He was convicted, dividing the family over his guilt.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 063

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: Who shot Austin TV executive Steven Beard as he slept? With only a single shotgun shell to go on, police would follow a trail from mansions and country clubs to bookstores and hospital psych wards.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: In 2001, University of South Carolina student Shelton Sanders disappeared while planning a friend's bachelor party.

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Pawn Shop Gets Robbed by a Man with a Sledgehammer/Fight at In N Out Over Raiders Game
programme.sub-title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas - Season 2 - Episode 113

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Off-Duty Officer Pulls Gun on Man at Gas Station/Man Arrested for Injecting Chemicals Under Neighbor's Door
programme.sub-title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas - Season 2 - Episode 120

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Woman Uses Child to Smuggle Contraband to Rikers Inmate/Yadkinville Gun Shop Robbed
programme.sub-title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas - Season 2 - Episode 063

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Pipe-wielding Tesla Driver Attacks Cars on Freeway/Store Owner Gets Robbed at Gunpoint
programme.sub-title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas - Season 2 - Episode 026

programme.desc: Mother Thwarts Attempted Kidnapping in Queens/Fight Breaks Out Between a Student and Substitute Teacher

programme.desc: Parents Fight During Graduation/Woman Knifes Tesla Model Y

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked
programme.desc: In 1971, before the era of airport security, a Black Panther hijacks a plane to Havana, Cuba. A thirty-year old cold case is finally solved in 2002 by a fluke of modern technology.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Stranger
programme.desc: Bored at home, a retiree takes a job at a 24-hour convenience store. On her third night at work a customer finds her behind the register in a pool of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls. For reasons apparent to the residents, they nickname him after the Scottish Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bitter Truth
programme.desc: When the curiosity of an insurance claims investigator is piqued by the suspicious circumstances surrounding the death of a young Sikh man, a trail of bigamy, deceit and murder is soon uncovered.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Ghost
programme.desc: A cunning arsonist stays one step ahead of the police and terrifies a small farming community until behavioural profiling help detectives zero in on a very unlikely suspect.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Old Mr. Williams who lives across the street from Mona has always kept to himself. // When she is reprimanded for breaking her mother's favorite vase, a miffed Mona seeks refuge in the basement a ten year old vampire's last sanctuary.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Hair-raising night-time howling. The mysterious disappearance of Mrs. Bryerson's poodle. // It's the annual science fair and Mona has pulled out all the stops.
programme.sub-title: The miserable phantom dog // Jurassic parking lot

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and friends try to get all the mothers in town to realize that Ms. Marvellous' tips are a recipe for disaster. // The annual spelling bee promises to be a stinging success when the local honey producer becomes its main sponsor.
programme.sub-title: Mona Vs. Ms. Marvelous // Spelling Bee

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Albert Einstein? Julius Caesar? Walking around downtown? // After a mysterious clockmaker does some work on the new town clock, strange things start to happen.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.sub-title: Miss Gotto's Haunted House // Cry of the Swamp Thing

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Fang develops a flea problem, which soon infests the whole house. // Ever since Principal Shawbly started jogging, he's felt a lot lighter.
programme.sub-title: Flea circus of horrors // Shadow of a doubt

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day but you wouldn't know it from the way everyone is acting. // The town is in an uproar.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's class goes on camping trip to learn more about nature. // Why has Charley seemed so unusually tired of late?
programme.sub-title: Spirit of the woods // The bogeyman cometh

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A black hole is threatening to swallow up Mona's town. // Mona decides the new wax museum curator is the perfect subject for her careers report until her research leads her to discover that his exhibits are just a little too lifelike."

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: It's a rainy afternoon, and Mona's tearing through the attic so noisily that her mother worries she'll wake the dead. // Mona and her pals are having the time of their lives at the fair until...dimensional warps start to occur.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: The new kid in class doesn't bring a very big lunch to school... in fact he eats like a bird. // There's something remarkable about the carefully manicured lawn and shrubs at the City Park.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Lily's obsession with a favourite cartoon sucks her right into the t.v. // The town's Medieval Days turn out to be a real blast from the past when Mona discovers an old suit of armour with a ghostly inhabitant.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Toon Town // Ghost in the Knight

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: The aging but still phantasmagoric Rockin' Reptiles are on a reunion tour // After suffering through a few weeks without one sighting of a ghost Mona and company are given cause to suspect that a vacuum cleaner salesman is sucking away ghosts

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: After the 'Jack' in Mona's antique Jack in the Box goes missing a strange new kid shows up // A trip out to a cornfield maze reveals the horrible truth of an imminent alien invasion.
programme.sub-title: Jack out of the Box // Crazy Crop Circles

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: After a baby with special charms causes adults in the town to turn into babies, it's up to Mona to break the spell. // Mona battles a creature made of trash that terrorizes the town during a garbage strike.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: While working in a fast food restaurant for Career's Week, the kids uncover an alien plot to enslave the whole town// When the old school bus is brought back into action George gets a very rough ride from the ghost inhabiting it.
programme.sub-title: Would You Like Fries With That? // The Haunted School Bus

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A flu epidemic hits the school. Mona makes the connection between the spreading flu and alien abductions. // When bad luck seems to be everywhere, Mona discovers that a vengeful postman has created the ultimate chain letter.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Arizona Smith, a klutzy archaeologist, excavates some local caves to find the mayor a bona fide tourist attraction // Mona, Charley and Lily discover the ornery ghost of Caboose Malloy and reopen the old case to find the real thief.
programme.sub-title: The Horned Horror // The Legend of Caboose Malloy

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mr. Hyde, who runs the town'S ice cream and coffee shop, is being run out of business by a slick competitor, the charismatic Dr. Java. // A strict librarian reprimands Mona for returning a late book for her book report.
programme.sub-title: Dr. Java and Mr. Hyde // Miss Dewey’s Dismal System

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona, Charley and Lily become alarmed when there's a local garter snake population explosion // The new weatherman Jonathan Jupiter is able to flawlessly predict the weather

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Potato plants spliced with jellyfish bring out a hybrid creature called Potato Fish who make people relax into a dull stupor // Mona discovers that the mysterious aunt staying with her family is really a Black Widow Spider.
programme.sub-title: Potato Fish Creepers // It’s All Relative

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A rock giant awakens in the old quarry, threatening to crush the town. // The trio attend a disappointing Space Camp run by a real astronaut, Sparky Nickerson.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and Charley beam a message via satellite to extraterrestrials across the universe // Mona's attempts to ward off an imminent invasion by red moon monsters are stymied by the new next-door-neighbor
programme.sub-title: The X-change student // Red Moon Monsters

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.sub-title: Lil' Freddy Frosty // Attack of the Bratty Vamp Pack

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's father takes on a new job and wears a strange old suit that seems to alter his personality for the worst. // When valuables go missing in the house, Mona discovers a family of trolls living in her basement.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mom's new pottery obsession leads Mona and her friends to investigate the studio // When Lily flushes Charley's Mer-monkeys down the drain, the consequences appear to be disastrous.
programme.sub-title: Ghastly Gargoyles Galore // Monkey Sea, Monkey Do

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and her pals must stop a feline invasion before the cats take over the town. // A rash of wereclown sightings tell Mona, Lily and Charley that a powerful Wereclown, threatening to infect everyone, is running amuck in their town.
programme.sub-title: The Cat Lady’s Meow // The Wereclown

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's secret scrapbook (or, as she calls it, \The Book of the Slimy\") has gone missing." // The regular cafeteria staff is on vacation and a husband and wife team by the name of Sam and Ella have taken over kitchen duties.
programme.sub-title: The Book of the Slimy // The Sam 'n Ella Infiltration

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and her pals have their hands full when Neptune, the god of the seas, discovers the long lost missing continent of Atlantis // The unseasonable early appearance of shadflies from the swamp behind Mr. McCaughllin's house arouses Mona's suspicion
programme.sub-title: Atlantis at Last // Invasion of the Shadflies

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's town is seized by paroxysms of sporadic exercise when a fitness instructor from Australia, Bruce, opens up a new fitness center. // When Miss Gotto falls ill and is replaced by a substitute, Mona immediately suspects foul play.
programme.sub-title: The Billabong Bunyip // The subhuman substitutes

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Eerie night time rattling. Disembodied groans. // There's a werewolf loose in the school, a furry, slobbering beast running amok in the hallowed halls of academia.
programme.sub-title: Creature from the Depths // Mona and the Werewolf

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: An evening's dining at a local Chinese restaurant takes a terrifying turn // Angela has started a chapter of the Pixies, an all girl service organization devoted to being helpful

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Miss Gotto's bossy older sister substitutes for her, Mona uncovers a horrible plot// After the kids encounter a maniacal wizard at the new Laser Dome, everything they imagine starts to come true.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: There seems to be something diabolically strange about Zelda the fortune teller.//Mable, the owner of the local health food store, has gone missing and fairy expert Lily senses big trouble.
programme.sub-title: Horrorscope // The Rescue of Queen Mab

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: At night Mona can hear the dreaded skeleton cowboy galloping through town on his phantom steed. // When U.N. Secretary General Harundi comes to town, Mona is disturbed to discover that he is under surveillance by the Men In Dark Suits
programme.sub-title: The skeleton cowboy // The men in dark suits

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's dad takes up his clubs and gets roped into a centuries old family grudge match// Charley's super microwave invention turns out to be a window on the future a very grim future where George rules the town.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Taxi Cab Murders
programme.desc: When a string of violent murders takes place, Cagney and Lacey go undercover as Taxi Cab drivers to try and find the killer. Lacey's family becomes hysterical at the prospect, fearing that Lacey will lose her life in pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Unusual Occurrence
programme.desc: When a young boy refuses to comply with her commands and Cagney (Sharon Gless) is forced to shoot him, her life becomes a nightmare. Cagney must deal with having shot a young boy, while the press claims it to be racially motivated.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Thank God It's Monday
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) spend the weekend on duty going through old paperwork when they discover a warrant for a rape case that expires in 24 hours. The two must race to serve the warrant before it expires.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hooked
programme.desc: During a drug raid, Cagney and Lacey arrest the man responsible for Dory McKenna's (guest star Barry Primus) drug rehabilitation on charges of narcotics possession. When the evidence disappears, Dory becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Lacey stops a woman's attempted suicide but feels guilt and responsibility when the woman turns up murdered soon after. When Cagney and Lacey investigate the murder, they soon discover a world of massive gambling debts and loan sharks.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Out Of Control
programme.desc: Cagney & Lacey investigate a homicide that occurred during an attempted burglary. They discover that the gun used was purchased illegally. In light of this information, Lacey also discovers that her son, Michael, has been playing with her revolver.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: American Dream
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate a series of fire-bombings in the garment district, and the trucking company that they suspect is behind them. Meanwhile, Harvey Lacey switches occupations and becomes a tax-shelter salesman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Happily Ever After
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate a larceny case after a stray bullet offers a new development in 32,000 petty theft cases. A singular credit department employee appears to be behind it all. Meanwhile, Dory McKenna proposes to Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Rules Of The Game
programme.desc: Cagney is requested by Capt. Hennessey to partner with him in the investigation of the murder of a foreign diplomat while Lacey is on desk duty. Everything becomes complicated when Cagney becomes a victim of sexual harassment by Capt. Hennessey.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Stress
programme.desc: Cagney witnesses a stabbing and apprehends a vicious criminal. But when the victim is found murdered, she becomes the only witness to hold the killer responsible. The killer, who has a history of making people disappear, begins to stalk Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Who Said It's Fair? (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey search for a young boy whose mother fears is missing. The detectives, however, suspect the child is working as a runner for a drug dealer. Lacey is reluctant to go to the doctor after she fears she might have breast cancer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Who Said It's Fair? (Part 2)
programme.desc: After finally visiting the doctors, Lacey receives the news that she must have a mastectomy, forcing her to face her own mortality and what that could mean for her family. Meanwhile, members of the 14th precinct are preparing for the Sergeant's exam.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lost And Found
programme.desc: While Lacey recovers from her surgery, she realizes that there may be more to life and wonders if she should retire from the police force. Meanwhile, Cagney is upset when her yellow Corvette is stolen with a piece of graffiti as the clue.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Two Grand
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go up against master jewel thief Albert Grand (guest star Ferdinand Mayne) once again when he suddenly resurfaces. Cagney is determined not to let him slip through her fingers this time.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Con Games
programme.desc: Cagney's character and professionalism comes under attack as her sexual harassment charges against Capt. Hennessey go to trial. She decides to stand on her own feet as she ignores advice and threats. Meanwhile, Lacey investigates a fraud case.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Violations
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are tasked with investigating the disappearance of a high-school kid. They uncover that he was accidentally sent to a violent prison for shoplifting. While there, he was attacked and raped, resulting in a lawsuit from his parents.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Organized Crime
programme.desc: When Cagney and Lacey investigate the brutal murder of a nun, they discover that the nun was the goddaughter of a local mobster. The mobster offers to conduct the investigation within his organization. Meanwhile, Cagney gets promoted to Sergeant.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: On The Street
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate the beating of a teenage runaway who has shunned her family's wealth and instead has been living and working on the streets as a hooker. The detectives must try and convince her to help convict her pimp.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas
programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.
programme.sub-title: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Oh Brother/Mighty Plumber
programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Robo Koopa
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Fire of Hercufleas
programme.desc: In the ancient city of Mythis, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are searching for a legendary hero named Hercufleas, who is an old friend of Toad's.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Do The Koopa/Kootie Pie Rocks
programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!
programme.sub-title: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario Meets Koop-Zilla
programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: In Lava Land, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool using a variety of floating rafts to reach an island named WakiWaki in the middle of the ocean

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mush Rumors/The Ugly Mermaid
programme.desc: A Family of Real World Humans stray off the vacation path and find themselves lost./In an underwater battle with King Koopa and his Doom Sub, the Brothers find Mev-tropolis.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.
programme.sub-title: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!
programme.sub-title: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men

programme.sub-title: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men

programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.
